description: Letter from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to an unidentified benefactor. Shelomo asks him to help him out with the payment of the capitation tax, as he had been ill and had to spend all the money he could save from school fees paid to him on medicine and chicken. (Information from Halper Catalogue and from Goitein's notes in margin)
tags: jizya, women's work, illness letter 969-1517, illness: cost, capitation tax, jaliya, Illness: treatment, Illness, tax
description_he: מכתב משלמה ב' אליהו לנדבן בלתי ידוע. מבקש עזרה בתשלום מס הגולגולת, שכן חלה והוציא את כל כספי שכר ההוראה על תרופות ותרנגולת.
